blocks.text: Connect HDS to the data link coupler (A) on the left side of the driver's seat.

items: Honda Smart Key registration must be done using HDS.
The latest HDS must be installed on the computer.
The date and time of the computer used in HDS must be correct.
Keep the computer as far away from the Honda Smart Key as possible.
The password obtained from MaRIS must be entered into HDS on the same day.
No more than one Honda Smart Key in the vehicle.
If electrical equipment other than Honda Genuine Parts is installed, the Honda Smart Key should be as far away as possible.
Doors must be closed during registration.

items.text: When the Honda Smart Key is registered, the keyless transmitter is also registered.
When the Honda Smart Key is registered, the keyless transmitter is also registered.
Up to six Honda Smart Keys can be registered.
Up to six Honda Smart Keys can be registered.
Prepare all registered Honda Smart Keys prior to the operation to ensure registration-deletion.
Prepare all registered Honda Smart Keys prior to the operation to ensure registration-deletion.

blocks.text: To add one new Honda Smart Key, do the following

Prepare one newly registered Honda Smart Key and one registered Honda Smart Key. Select "One Push Start System" in HDS, then "Register Honda Smart Key" in "Registration", Select "Add Honda Smart Key" and follow the on-screen instructions of the HDS to proceed with the registration process. Ensure that the system operates properly with all Honda Smart Keys that have completed registration. To add two or more Honda Smart Keys, register the Honda Smart Key.
If you lose one of your registered Honda Smart Keys or register more than one Honda Smart Key at the same time, perform the following

Prepare all registered Honda Smart Keys. If you are adding a new Honda Smart Key, prepare all new Honda Smart Keys as well. Select "One Push Start System" in HDS, then "Register Honda Smart Key" in "Registration", Select "Honda Smart Key Registration" and follow the on-screen instructions of the HDS to proceed with the registration process. Ensure that the system operates properly with all Honda Smart Keys that have completed registration.
If you have lost all of your registered Honda Smart Keys, perform the following tasks

Prepare all new Honda Smart Keys to be registered. HDS "Does the DLC cable have a 3-pin or 5-pin DLC adapter attached?" and select "NO". Check the "Is the HDS equipped with a one-push start system?" and select "YES". Operate the ENGINE START STOP switch according to the HDS display. Confirm "Ignition switch is ON" in HDS and press ENTER. Select "One Push Start System" in HDS, then "Register Honda Smart Key" in "Registration", Select "Lose all Honda Smart Keys" and follow the on-screen instructions in HDS to proceed with the registration process. Ensure that the system operates properly with all Honda Smart Keys that have completed registration.
